name: Relative Binding Free Energy
description: State of the art physics-based relative binding free energy calculation. Given a receptor pdb structure and multiple ligand sdfs, rank the ligands by binding affinity to the receptor.
capabilities: State of the art physics-based relative binding free energy calculation
Given a receptor pdb structure and multiple ligand sdfs, rank the ligands by binding affinity to the receptor

receptor.description: Receptor protein structure in PDB format

ligands.description: Multiple ligand structures in SDF format (multi-molecule SDF file) to rank by binding affinity
